subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from Him Who is imprisoned unto him who hath been guided by the lights of the Spirit in this Dawn that hath been [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المسجون الی الذی اهتدی بانوار الروح فی  هذالفجر  الذی کان
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment
